description: User intelligence — registrations, tier progression, activation funnels, and cohort analysis.

panels.description: Total registered users (non-banned) as of the latest sync.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_users
FROM d1_user
WHERE synced_at = (SELECT max(synced_at) FROM d1_user)
  AND banned = 0

panels.title: Total Users

panels.description: New registrations in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS new_users
FROM d1_user
WHERE synced_at = (SELECT max(synced_at) FROM d1_user)
  AND created_at IS NOT NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(fromUnixTimestamp(created_at))

panels.title: New Users (Period)

panels.description: Tier distribution of all active (non-banned) users.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT tier, COUNT(*) AS users
FROM d1_user
WHERE synced_at = (SELECT max(synced_at) FROM d1_user)
  AND banned = 0
GROUP BY tier
ORDER BY users DESC

panels.title: Tier Distribution

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS banned_users
FROM d1_user
WHERE synced_at = (SELECT max(synced_at) FROM d1_user)
  AND banned = 1

panels.description: New user registrations over time, grouped by the selected granularity. Uses the Grafana time range picker to filter.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_trunc('$granularity', fromUnixTimestamp(assumeNotNull(created_at))) AS ts,
  count() AS registrations
FROM d1_user
WHERE synced_at = (SELECT max(synced_at) FROM d1_user)
  AND created_at IS NOT NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(fromUnixTimestamp(created_at))
GROUP BY ts
ORDER BY ts ASC

panels.title: User Registrations

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ts,
  sum(user_tier) OVER (ORDER BY ts ASC) AS user_tier,
  sum(dev_tier) OVER (ORDER BY ts ASC) AS dev_tier,
  sum(abuser_tier) OVER (ORDER BY ts ASC) AS abuser_tier,
  sum(dead_tier) OVER (ORDER BY ts ASC) AS dead_tier
FROM (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('$granularity', fromUnixTimestamp(assumeNotNull(created_at))) AS ts,
    countIf(tier = 'spore' AND banned = 0) AS user_tier,
    countIf(tier IN ('seed', 'flower', 'nectar') AND banned = 0) AS dev_tier,
    countIf(tier = 'microbe' AND banned = 0) AS abuser_tier,
    countIf(banned = 1) AS dead_tier
  FROM d1_user
  WHERE synced_at = (SELECT max(synced_at) FROM d1_user)
    AND created_at IS NOT NULL
    AND $__timeFilter(fromUnixTimestamp(created_at))
  GROUP BY ts
  ORDER BY ts ASC
)

panels.description: Registration growth rate vs previous period. Adapts to selected granularity (DoD, WoW, MoM, etc).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ts,
  if(prev > 0, round((registrations - prev) / prev * 100, 1), null) AS growth_pct
FROM (
  SELECT
    ts,
    registrations,
    lagInFrame(registrations) OVER (ORDER BY ts ASC) AS prev
  FROM (
    SELECT
      date_trunc('$granularity', fromUnixTimestamp(assumeNotNull(created_at))) AS ts,
      count() AS registrations
    FROM d1_user
    WHERE synced_at = (SELECT max(synced_at) FROM d1_user)
      AND created_at IS NOT NULL
      AND $__timeFilter(fromUnixTimestamp(created_at))
    GROUP BY ts
    ORDER BY ts ASC
  )
)
WHERE prev IS NOT NULL

panels.title: Registration Growth Rate

panels.description: New registrations broken down by tier assigned at registration time.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_trunc('$granularity', fromUnixTimestamp(assumeNotNull(created_at))) AS ts,
  tier,
  count() AS registrations
FROM d1_user
WHERE synced_at = (SELECT max(synced_at) FROM d1_user)
  AND created_at IS NOT NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(fromUnixTimestamp(created_at))
GROUP BY ts, tier
ORDER BY ts ASC

panels.title: Registrations by Tier
Top Countries by Revenue
panels.description: Total Stripe revenue per buyer country (ISO-3166 alpha-2). Live payments only.

Region'], code) AS country,
  round(SUM(amount_cents) / 100.0, 2) AS revenue
FROM stripe_event
WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp < $__toTime
  AND event_type = 'checkout.session.completed'
  AND payment_status = 'paid'
  AND livemode = 1
  AND code != ''
GROUP BY country
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 15

panels.title: Pack Mix (Overall)
panels.description: Share of paid checkouts by pack size. Derived from amount_cents (200 = $2, 500 = $5, 1000 = $10, ...).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  multiIf(
    amount_cents = 200, '$2',
    amount_cents = 500, '$5',
    amount_cents = 1000, '$10',
    amount_cents = 2000, '$20',
    amount_cents = 5000, '$50',
    amount_cents = 10000, '$100',
    'Other'
  ) AS pack,
  count() AS purchases
FROM stripe_event
WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp < $__toTime
  AND event_type = 'checkout.session.completed'
  AND payment_status = 'paid'
  AND livemode = 1
GROUP BY pack
ORDER BY purchases DESC

ORDER BY ("$2" + "$5" + "$10" + "$20" + "$50" + "$100") DESC
LIMIT 10

panels.title: Revenue by Country (Top 5 + Other)
panels.description: Daily/weekly/monthly Stripe revenue, stacked by buyer country. Top 5 countries by total revenue in range, rest bucketed as 'Other'.

targets.rawSql:
WITH top_codes AS (
  SELECT JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'customer_details', 'address', 'country') AS c
  FROM stripe_event
  WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp < $__toTime
    AND event_type = 'checkout.session.completed'
    AND payment_status = 'paid'
    AND livemode = 1
  GROUP BY c
  HAVING c != ''
  ORDER BY SUM(amount_cents) DESC
  LIMIT 5
)
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 $granularity) AS time,
  if(
    code IN (SELECT c FROM top_codes),
    transform(code, ['AC','AD','AE','AF','AG','AI','AL','AM','AN','AO','AQ','AR','AS','AT','AU','AW','AZ','BA','BB','BD','BE','BF','BG','BH','BI','BJ','BL','BM','BN','BO','BQ','BR','BS','BT','BU','BV','BW','BY','BZ','CA','CC','CD','CF','CG','CH','CI','CK','CL','CM','CN','CO','CP','CQ','CR','CS','CU','CV','CW','CX','CY','CZ','DD','DE','DG','DJ','DK','DM','DO','DY','DZ','EA','EC','EE','EG','EH','ER','ES','ET','EU','EZ','FI','FJ','FK','FM','FO','FR','FX','GA','GB','GD','GE','GF','GG','GH','GI','GL','GM','GN','GP','GQ','GR','GS','GT','GU','GW','GY','HK','HM','HN','HR','HT','HU','HV','IC','ID','IE','IL','IM','IN','IO','IQ','IR','IS','IT','JE','JM','JO','JP','KE','KG','KH','KI','KM','KN','KP','KR','KW','KY','KZ','LA','LB','LC','LI','LK','LR','LS','LT','LU','LV','LY','MA','MC','MD','ME','MF','MG','MH','MK','ML','MM','MN','MO','MP','MQ','MR','MS','MT','MU','MV','MW','MX','MY','MZ','NA','NC','NE','NF','NG','NH','NI','NL','NO','NP','NR','NU','NZ','OM','PA','PE','PF','PG','PH','PK','PL','PM','PN','PR','PS','PT','PW','PY','QA','QO','RE','RH','RO','RS','RU','RW','SA','SB','SC','SD','SE','SG','SH','SI','SJ','SK','SL','SM','SN','SO','SR','SS','ST','SU','SV','SX','SY','SZ','TA','TC','TD','TF','TG','TH','TJ','TK','TL','TM','TN','TO','TP','TR','TT','TV','TW','TZ','UA','UG','UK','UM','UN','US','UY','UZ','VA','VC','VD','VE','VG','VI','VN','VU','WF','WS','XA','XB','XK','YD','YE','YT','YU','ZA','ZM','ZR','ZW','ZZ'], Islands','Martinique','Mauritania','Montserrat','Malta','Mauritius','Maldives','Malawi','Mexico','Malaysia','Mozambique','Namibia','New Caledonia','Niger','Norfolk Island','Nigeria','Vanuatu','Nicaragua','Netherlands','Norway','Nepal','Nauru','Niue','New Zealand','Oman','Panama','Peru','French Polynesia','Papua New Guinea','Philippines','Pakistan','Poland','St. Pierre & Miquelon','Pitcairn Islands','Puerto Rico','Palestinian Territories','Portugal','Palau','Paraguay','Qatar','Outlying Oceania','Réunion','Zimbabwe','Romania','Serbia','Russia','Rwanda','Saudi Arabia','Solomon Islands','Seychelles','Sudan','Sweden','Singapore','St. Helena','Slovenia','Svalbard & Jan Mayen','Slovakia','Sierra Leone','San Marino','Senegal','Somalia','Suriname','South Sudan','São Tomé & Príncipe','Russia','El Salvador','Sint Maarten','Syria','Eswatini','Tristan da Cunha','Turks & Caicos Islands','Chad','French Southern Territories','Togo','Thailand','Tajikistan','Tokelau','Timor-Leste','Turkmenistan','Tunisia','Tonga','Timor-Leste','Türkiye','Trinidad & Tobago','Tuvalu','Taiwan','Tanzania','Ukraine','Uganda','United Kingdom','U.S. Outlying Islands','United Nations','United States','Uruguay','Uzbekistan','Vatican City','St. Vincent & Grenadines','Vietnam','Venezuela','British Virgin Islands','U.S. Virgin Islands','Vietnam','Vanuatu','Wallis & Futuna','Samoa','Pseudo-Accents','Pseudo-Bidi','Kosovo','Yemen','Yemen','Mayotte','Serbia','South Africa','Zambia','Congo - Kinshasa','Zimbabwe','Unknown Region'], code),
    'Other'
  ) AS country,
  round(SUM(amount_cents) / 100.0, 2) AS revenue
FROM (
  SELECT
    timestamp,
    amount_cents,
    JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'customer_details', 'address', 'country') AS code
  FROM stripe_event
  WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp < $__toTime
    AND event_type = 'checkout.session.completed'
    AND payment_status = 'paid'
    AND livemode = 1
)
GROUP BY time, country
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Payment Method Mix (Paid)
panels.description: Share of successful checkouts by the ACTUAL payment method used. Joins checkout.session.completed to its payment_intent.succeeded sibling (by payment_intent ID) and reads charges[0].payment_method_details.type from the PI payload. Sessions without a matching PI event roll up as 'unknown'.

targets.rawSql:
WITH
  cs_completed AS (
    SELECT
      JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'payment_intent') AS pi_id,
      JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'customer_details', 'address', 'country') AS code,
      amount_cents,
      timestamp
    FROM stripe_event
    WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp < $__toTime
      AND event_type = 'checkout.session.completed'
      AND payment_status = 'paid'
      AND livemode = 1
  ),
  pi_methods AS (
    SELECT
      JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'id') AS pi_id,
      coalesce(
        nullIf(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'charges', 'data', 1, 'payment_method_details', 'type'), ''),
        nullIf(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'latest_charge', 'payment_method_details', 'type'), ''),
        'unknown'
      ) AS real_method
    FROM stripe_event
    WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp < $__toTime
      AND event_type = 'payment_intent.succeeded'
      AND livemode = 1
  )
SELECT
  coalesce(nullIf(p.real_method, ''), 'unknown') AS payment_method,
  count() AS purchases
FROM cs_completed s
LEFT JOIN pi_methods p ON s.pi_id = p.pi_id
GROUP BY payment_method
ORDER BY purchases DESC

panels.title: Top Countries × Payment Method
panels.description: Top 10 countries by paid checkouts, stacked by the ACTUAL payment method used (joined from payment_intent.succeeded).

targets.rawSql:
WITH
  cs_completed AS (
    SELECT
      JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'payment_intent') AS pi_id,
      JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'customer_details', 'address', 'country') AS code,
      amount_cents,
      timestamp
    FROM stripe_event
    WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp < $__toTime
      AND event_type = 'checkout.session.completed'
      AND payment_status = 'paid'
      AND livemode = 1
  ),
  pi_methods AS (
    SELECT
      JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'id') AS pi_id,
      coalesce(
        nullIf(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'charges', 'data', 1, 'payment_method_details', 'type'), ''),
        nullIf(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'latest_charge', 'payment_method_details', 'type'), ''),
        'unknown'
      ) AS real_method
    FROM stripe_event
    WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp < $__toTime
      AND event_type = 'payment_intent.succeeded'
      AND livemode = 1
  ),
  joined AS (
    SELECT s.code, coalesce(nullIf(p.real_method, ''), 'unknown') AS payment_method
    FROM cs_completed s
    LEFT JOIN pi_methods p ON s.pi_id = p.pi_id
    WHERE s.code != ''
  )
SELECT
  transform(code, ['AC','AD','AE','AF','AG','AI','AL','AM','AN','AO','AQ','AR','AS','AT','AU','AW','AZ','BA','BB','BD','BE','BF','BG','BH','BI','BJ','BL','BM','BN','BO','BQ','BR','BS','BT','BU','BV','BW','BY','BZ','CA','CC','CD','CF','CG','CH','CI','CK','CL','CM','CN','CO','CP','CQ','CR','CS','CU','CV','CW','CX','CY','CZ','DD','DE','DG','DJ','DK','DM','DO','DY','DZ','EA','EC','EE','EG','EH','ER','ES','ET','EU','EZ','FI','FJ','FK','FM','FO','FR','FX','GA','GB','GD','GE','GF','GG','GH','GI','GL','GM','GN','GP','GQ','GR','GS','GT','GU','GW','GY','HK','HM','HN','HR','HT','HU','HV','IC','ID','IE','IL','IM','IN','IO','IQ','IR','IS','IT','JE','JM','JO','JP','KE','KG','KH','KI','KM','KN','KP','KR','KW','KY','KZ','LA','LB','LC','LI','LK','LR','LS','LT','LU','LV','LY','MA','MC','MD','ME','MF','MG','MH','MK','ML','MM','MN','MO','MP','MQ','MR','MS','MT','MU','MV','MW','MX','MY','MZ','NA','NC','NE','NF','NG','NH','NI','NL','NO','NP','NR','NU','NZ','OM','PA','PE','PF','PG','PH','PK','PL','PM','PN','PR','PS','PT','PW','PY','QA','QO','RE','RH','RO','RS','RU','RW','SA','SB','SC','SD','SE','SG','SH','SI','SJ','SK','SL','SM','SN','SO','SR','SS','ST','SU','SV','SX','SY','SZ','TA','TC','TD','TF','TG','TH','TJ','TK','TL','TM','TN','TO','TP','TR','TT','TV','TW','TZ','UA','UG','UK','UM','UN','US','UY','UZ','VA','VC','VD','VE','VG','VI','VN','VU','WF','WS','XA','XB','XK','YD','YE','YT','YU','ZA','ZM','ZR','ZW','ZZ'], ['Ascension Island','Andorra','United Arab Emirates','Afghanistan','Antigua & Barbuda','Anguilla','Albania','Armenia','Curaçao','Angola','Antarctica','Argentina','American Samoa','Austria','Australia','Aruba','Azerbaijan','Bosnia & Herzegovina','Barbados','Bangladesh','Belgium','Burkina Faso','Bulgaria','Bahrain','Burundi','Benin','St. Islands','France','France','Gabon','United Kingdom','Grenada','Georgia','French Guiana','Guernsey','Ghana','Gibraltar','Greenland','Gambia','Guinea','Guadeloupe','Equatorial Guinea','Greece','South Georgia & South Sandwich Islands','Guatemala','Guam','Guinea-Bissau','Guyana','Hong Kong SAR China','Heard & McDonald Islands','Honduras','Croatia','Haiti','Hungary','Burkina Faso','Canary Islands','Martinique','Mauritania','Montserrat','Malta','Mauritius','Maldives','Malawi','Mexico','Malaysia','Mozambique','Namibia','New Caledonia','Niger','Norfolk Island','Nigeria','Vanuatu','Nicaragua','Netherlands','Norway','Nepal','Nauru','Niue','New Zealand','Oman','Panama','Peru','French Polynesia','Papua New Guinea','Philippines','Pakistan','Poland','St. Pierre & Miquelon','Pitcairn Islands','Puerto Rico','Palestinian Territories','Portugal','Palau','Paraguay','Qatar','Outlying Oceania','Réunion','Zimbabwe','Romania','Serbia','Russia','Rwanda','Saudi Arabia','Solomon Islands','Seychelles','Sudan','Sweden','Singapore','St. Helena','Slovenia','Svalbard & Jan Mayen','Slovakia','Sierra Leone','San Marino','Senegal','Somalia','Suriname','South Sudan','São Tomé & Príncipe','Russia','El Salvador','Sint Maarten','Syria','Eswatini','Tristan da Cunha','Turks & Caicos Islands','Chad','French Southern Territories','Togo','Thailand','Tajikistan','Tokelau','Timor-Leste','Turkmenistan','Tunisia','Tonga','Timor-Leste','Türkiye','Trinidad & Tobago','Tuvalu','Taiwan','Tanzania','Ukraine','Uganda','United Kingdom','U.S. Outlying Islands','United Nations','United States','Uruguay','Uzbekistan','Vatican City','St. Vincent & Grenadines','Vietnam','Venezuela','British Virgin Islands','U.S. Virgin Islands','Vietnam','Vanuatu','Wallis & Futuna','Samoa','Pseudo-Accents','Pseudo-Bidi','Kosovo','Yemen','Yemen','Mayotte','Serbia','South Africa','Zambia','Congo - Kinshasa','Zimbabwe','Unknown Region'], code) AS country,
  countIf(payment_method = 'card')        AS card,
  countIf(payment_method = 'link')        AS link,
  countIf(payment_method = 'paypal')      AS paypal,
  countIf(payment_method = 'cashapp')     AS cashapp,
  countIf(payment_method = 'klarna')      AS klarna,
  countIf(payment_method = 'sepa_debit')  AS sepa_debit,
  countIf(payment_method = 'ideal')       AS ideal,
  countIf(payment_method = 'bancontact')  AS bancontact,
  countIf(payment_method NOT IN ('card','link','paypal','cashapp','klarna','sepa_debit','ideal','bancontact','unknown')) AS other,
  countIf(payment_method = 'unknown')     AS unknown
FROM joined
GROUP BY country
HAVING (card+link+paypal+cashapp+klarna+sepa_debit+ideal+bancontact+other+unknown) > 0
ORDER BY (card+link+paypal+cashapp+klarna+sepa_debit+ideal+bancontact+other+unknown) DESC
LIMIT 10

panels.title: Failure Rate by Payment Method
panels.description: Successes = paid checkout.session.completed events, attributed to the ACTUAL method via payment_intent.succeeded join. Failures = payment_intent.payment_failed (method from last_payment_error.payment_method.type) + checkout.session.expired (method = 'unknown', Stripe doesn't tell us which method the user picked before abandoning).

targets.rawSql:
WITH
  cs_completed AS (
    SELECT
      JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'payment_intent') AS pi_id,
      JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'customer_details', 'address', 'country') AS code,
      amount_cents,
      timestamp
    FROM stripe_event
    WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp < $__toTime
      AND event_type = 'checkout.session.completed'
      AND payment_status = 'paid'
      AND livemode = 1
  ),
  pi_methods AS (
    SELECT
      JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'id') AS pi_id,
      coalesce(
        nullIf(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'charges', 'data', 1, 'payment_method_details', 'type'), ''),
        nullIf(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'latest_charge', 'payment_method_details', 'type'), ''),
        'unknown'
      ) AS real_method
    FROM stripe_event
    WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp < $__toTime
      AND event_type = 'payment_intent.succeeded'
      AND livemode = 1
  ),
  success_by_method AS (
    SELECT coalesce(nullIf(p.real_method, ''), 'unknown') AS payment_method, count() AS successes
    FROM cs_completed s LEFT JOIN pi_methods p ON s.pi_id = p.pi_id
    GROUP BY payment_method
  ),
  failure_by_method AS (
    SELECT
      multiIf(
        event_type = 'checkout.session.expired', 'unknown',
        coalesce(
          nullIf(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'last_payment_error', 'payment_method', 'type'), ''),
          nullIf(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'charges', 'data', 1, 'payment_method_details', 'type'), ''),
          'unknown'
        )
      ) AS payment_method,
      count() AS failures
    FROM stripe_event
    WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp < $__toTime
      AND event_type IN ('payment_intent.payment_failed','checkout.session.expired')
      AND livemode = 1
    GROUP BY payment_method
  )
SELECT
  coalesce(nullIf(s.payment_method, ''), f.payment_method) AS payment_method,
  coalesce(s.successes, 0) AS successes,
  coalesce(f.failures, 0)  AS failures,
  (coalesce(s.successes, 0) + coalesce(f.failures, 0)) AS attempts,
  round(100.0 * coalesce(f.failures, 0) / nullIf(coalesce(s.successes, 0) + coalesce(f.failures, 0), 0), 1) AS failure_rate_pct
FROM success_by_method s
FULL OUTER JOIN failure_by_method f ON s.payment_method = f.payment_method
WHERE (coalesce(s.successes, 0) + coalesce(f.failures, 0)) > 0
ORDER BY attempts DESC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: Failures: Country × Payment Method
panels.description: Per (country, payment method) pair: attempts and failures. Successes from checkout.session.completed paid, joined to payment_intent.succeeded for the ACTUAL method. Failures from payment_intent.payment_failed (real method from last_payment_error) + checkout.session.expired (method = unknown).

targets.rawSql:
WITH
  cs_completed AS (
    SELECT
      JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'payment_intent') AS pi_id,
      JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'customer_details', 'address', 'country') AS code,
      amount_cents,
      timestamp
    FROM stripe_event
    WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp < $__toTime
      AND event_type = 'checkout.session.completed'
      AND payment_status = 'paid'
      AND livemode = 1
  ),
  pi_methods AS (
    SELECT
      JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'id') AS pi_id,
      coalesce(
        nullIf(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'charges', 'data', 1, 'payment_method_details', 'type'), ''),
        nullIf(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'latest_charge', 'payment_method_details', 'type'), ''),
        'unknown'
      ) AS real_method
    FROM stripe_event
    WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp < $__toTime
      AND event_type = 'payment_intent.succeeded'
      AND livemode = 1
  ),
  successes AS (
    SELECT s.code, coalesce(nullIf(p.real_method, ''), 'unknown') AS payment_method
    FROM cs_completed s LEFT JOIN pi_methods p ON s.pi_id = p.pi_id
    WHERE s.code != ''
  ),
  failures AS (
    SELECT
      coalesce(
        nullIf(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'customer_details', 'address', 'country'), ''),
        nullIf(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'last_payment_error', 'payment_method', 'billing_details', 'address', 'country'), ''),
        nullIf(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'charges', 'data', 1, 'billing_details', 'address', 'country'), ''),
        ''
      ) AS code,
      multiIf(
        event_type = 'checkout.session.expired', 'unknown',
        coalesce(
          nullIf(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'last_payment_error', 'payment_method', 'type'), ''),
          nullIf(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'charges', 'data', 1, 'payment_method_details', 'type'), ''),
          'unknown'
        )
      ) AS payment_method
    FROM stripe_event
    WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp < $__toTime
      AND event_type IN ('payment_intent.payment_failed','checkout.session.expired')
      AND livemode = 1
  ),
  combined AS (
    SELECT code, payment_method, 1 AS s, 0 AS f FROM successes WHERE code != ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT code, payment_method, 0 AS s, 1 AS f FROM failures WHERE code != ''
  )
SELECT
  transform(code, ['AC','AD','AE','AF','AG','AI','AL','AM','AN','AO','AQ','AR','AS','AT','AU','AW','AZ','BA','BB','BD','BE','BF','BG','BH','BI','BJ','BL','BM','BN','BO','BQ','BR','BS','BT','BU','BV','BW','BY','BZ','CA','CC','CD','CF','CG','CH','CI','CK','CL','CM','CN','CO','CP','CQ','CR','CS','CU','CV','CW','CX','CY','CZ','DD','DE','DG','DJ','DK','DM','DO','DY','DZ','EA','EC','EE','EG','EH','ER','ES','ET','EU','EZ','FI','FJ','FK','FM','FO','FR','FX','GA','GB','GD','GE','GF','GG','GH','GI','GL','GM','GN','GP','GQ','GR','GS','GT','GU','GW','GY','HK','HM','HN','HR','HT','HU','HV','IC','ID','IE','IL','IM','IN','IO','IQ','IR','IS','IT','JE','JM','JO','JP','KE','KG','KH','KI','KM','KN','KP','KR','KW','KY','KZ','LA','LB','LC','LI','LK','LR','LS','LT','LU','LV','LY','MA','MC','MD','ME','MF','MG','MH','MK','ML','MM','MN','MO','MP','MQ','MR','MS','MT','MU','MV','MW','MX','MY','MZ','NA','NC','NE','NF','NG','NH','NI','NL','NO','NP','NR','NU','NZ','OM','PA','PE','PF','PG','PH','PK','PL','PM','PN','PR','PS','PT','PW','PY','QA','QO','RE','RH','RO','RS','RU','RW','SA','SB','SC','SD','SE','SG','SH','SI','SJ','SK','SL','SM','SN','SO','SR','SS','ST','SU','SV','SX','SY','SZ','TA','TC','TD','TF','TG','TH','TJ','TK','TL','TM','TN','TO','TP','TR','TT','TV','TW','TZ','UA','UG','UK','UM','UN','US','UY','UZ','VA','VC','VD','VE','VG','VI','VN','VU','WF','WS','XA','XB','XK','YD','YE','YT','YU','ZA','ZM','ZR','ZW','ZZ'], ['Ascension Island','Andorra','United Arab Emirates','Afghanistan','Antigua & Barbuda','Anguilla','Albania','Armenia','Curaçao','Angola','Antarctica','Argentina','American Samoa','Austria','Australia','Aruba','Azerbaijan','Bosnia & Herzegovina','Barbados','Bangladesh','Belgium','Burkina Faso','Bulgaria','Bahrain','Burundi','Benin','St. Barthélemy','Bermuda','Brunei','Bolivia','Caribbean Netherlands','Brazil','Bahamas','Bhutan','Myanmar (Burma)','Bouvet Island','Botswana','Belarus','Belize','Canada','Cocos (Keeling) Islands','Congo - Kinshasa','Central African Republic','Congo - Brazzaville','Switzerland','Côte d’Ivoire','Cook Islands','Chile','Cameroon','China','Colombia','Clipperton Island','Sark','Costa Rica','Serbia','Cuba','Cape Verde','Curaçao','Christmas Island','Cyprus','Czechia','Germany','Germany','Diego Garcia','Djibouti','Denmark','Dominica','Dominican Republic','Benin','Algeria','Ceuta & Melilla','Ecuador','Estonia','Egypt','Western Sahara','Eritrea','Spain','Ethiopia','European Union','Eurozone','Finland','Fiji','Falkland Islands','Micronesia','Faroe Islands','France','France','Gabon','United Kingdom','Grenada','Georgia','French Guiana','Guernsey','Ghana','Gibraltar','Greenland','Gambia','Guinea','Guadeloupe','Equatorial Guinea','Greece','South Georgia & South Sandwich Islands','Guatemala','Guam','Guinea-Bissau','Guyana','Hong Kong SAR China','Heard & McDonald Islands','Honduras','Croatia','Haiti','Hungary','Burkina Faso','Canary Islands','Indonesia','Ireland','Israel','Isle of Man','India','British Indian Ocean Territory','Iraq','Iran','Iceland','Italy','Jersey','Jamaica','Jordan','Japan','Kenya','Kyrgyzstan','Cambodia','Kiribati','Comoros','St. Kitts & Nevis','North Korea','South Korea','Kuwait','Cayman Islands','Kazakhstan','Laos','Lebanon','St. Lucia','Liechtenstein','Sri Lanka','Liberia','Lesotho','Lithuania','Luxembourg','Latvia','Libya','Morocco','Monaco','Moldova','Montenegro','St. Martin','Madagascar','Marshall Islands','North Macedonia','Mali','Myanmar (Burma)','Mongolia','Macao SAR China','Northern Mariana Islands','Martinique','Mauritania','Montserrat','Malta','Mauritius','Maldives','Malawi','Mexico','Malaysia','Mozambique','Namibia','New Caledonia','Niger','Norfolk Island','Nigeria','Vanuatu','Nicaragua','Netherlands','Norway','Nepal','Nauru','Niue','New Zealand','Oman','Panama','Peru','French Polynesia','Papua New Guinea','Philippines','Pakistan','Poland','St. Pierre & Miquelon','Pitcairn Islands','Puerto Rico','Palestinian Territories','Portugal','Palau','Paraguay','Qatar','Outlying Oceania','Réunion','Zimbabwe','Romania','Serbia','Russia','Rwanda','Saudi Arabia','Solomon Islands','Seychelles','Sudan','Sweden','Singapore','St. Helena','Slovenia','Svalbard & Jan Mayen','Slovakia','Sierra Leone','San Marino','Senegal','Somalia','Suriname','South Sudan','São Tomé & Príncipe','Russia','El Salvador','Sint Maarten','Syria','Eswatini','Tristan da Cunha','Turks & Caicos Islands','Chad','French Southern Territories','Togo','Thailand','Tajikistan','Tokelau','Timor-Leste','Turkmenistan','Tunisia','Tonga','Timor-Leste','Türkiye','Trinidad & Tobago','Tuvalu','Taiwan','Tanzania','Ukraine','Uganda','United Kingdom','U.S. Outlying Islands','United Nations','United States','Uruguay','Uzbekistan','Vatican City','St. Vincent & Grenadines','Vietnam','Venezuela','British Virgin Islands','U.S. Virgin Islands','Vietnam','Vanuatu','Wallis & Futuna','Samoa','Pseudo-Accents','Pseudo-Bidi','Kosovo','Yemen','Yemen','Mayotte','Serbia','South Africa','Zambia','Congo - Kinshasa','Zimbabwe','Unknown Region'], code) AS country,
  payment_method,
  sum(s) AS successes,
  sum(f) AS failures,
  (sum(s) + sum(f)) AS attempts,
  round(100.0 * sum(f) / nullIf(sum(s) + sum(f), 0), 1) AS failure_rate_pct
FROM combined
GROUP BY country, payment_method
HAVING attempts >= 2
ORDER BY failures DESC, failure_rate_pct DESC
LIMIT 50

panels.title: Failure Reasons
panels.description: What kinds of failures we're seeing. Reason = Stripe's decline_code if present, else error code, else '(no detail)' for abandoned sessions. % is share of all failures in the time range.

targets.rawSql:
WITH failures AS (
    SELECT
      multiIf(
        event_type = 'checkout.session.expired', 'session_abandoned',
        payment_status = 'failed', 'payment_declined',
        'other_failure'
      ) AS failure_category,
      nullIf(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'last_payment_error', 'code'), '')         AS err_code,
      nullIf(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'last_payment_error', 'decline_code'), '') AS decline_code,
      nullIf(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'last_payment_error', 'message'), '')     AS err_message
    FROM stripe_event
    WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp < $__toTime
      AND event_type IN ('payment_intent.payment_failed','checkout.session.expired')
      AND livemode = 1
  )
SELECT
  failure_category,
  coalesce(decline_code, err_code, '(no detail)') AS reason,
  any(err_message) AS sample_message,
  count() AS failures,
  round(100.0 * count() / (SELECT count() FROM failures), 1) AS pct_of_failures
FROM failures
GROUP BY failure_category, reason
ORDER BY failures DESC
LIMIT 30

panels.title: Failures: Country × Reason
panels.description: Which failure reasons hit which countries (and which payment method actually failed). real_method from last_payment_error.payment_method.type for declines; "unknown" for abandoned sessions.

targets.rawSql:
WITH failures AS (
    SELECT
      multiIf(
        event_type = 'checkout.session.expired', 'session_abandoned',
        payment_status = 'failed', 'payment_declined',
        'other_failure'
      ) AS failure_category,
      coalesce(
        nullIf(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'last_payment_error', 'decline_code'), ''),
        nullIf(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'last_payment_error', 'code'), ''),
        '(no detail)'
      ) AS reason,
      coalesce(
        nullIf(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'customer_details', 'address', 'country'), ''),
        nullIf(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'last_payment_error', 'payment_method', 'billing_details', 'address', 'country'), ''),
        nullIf(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'charges', 'data', 1, 'billing_details', 'address', 'country'), ''),
        ''
      ) AS code,
      multiIf(
        event_type = 'checkout.session.expired', 'unknown',
        coalesce(
          nullIf(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'last_payment_error', 'payment_method', 'type'), ''),
          nullIf(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'charges', 'data', 1, 'payment_method_details', 'type'), ''),
          'unknown'
        )
      ) AS payment_method
    FROM stripe_event
    WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp < $__toTime
      AND event_type IN ('payment_intent.payment_failed','checkout.session.expired')
      AND livemode = 1
  )
SELECT
  transform(code, ['AC','AD','AE','AF','AG','AI','AL','AM','AN','AO','AQ','AR','AS','AT','AU','AW','AZ','BA','BB','BD','BE','BF','BG','BH','BI','BJ','BL','BM','BN','BO','BQ','BR','BS','BT','BU','BV','BW','BY','BZ','CA','CC','CD','CF','CG','CH','CI','CK','CL','CM','CN','CO','CP','CQ','CR','CS','CU','CV','CW','CX','CY','CZ','DD','DE','DG','DJ','DK','DM','DO','DY','DZ','EA','EC','EE','EG','EH','ER','ES','ET','EU','EZ','FI','FJ','FK','FM','FO','FR','FX','GA','GB','GD','GE','GF','GG','GH','GI','GL','GM','GN','GP','GQ','GR','GS','GT','GU','GW','GY','HK','HM','HN','HR','HT','HU','HV','IC','ID','IE','IL','IM','IN','IO','IQ','IR','IS','IT','JE','JM','JO','JP','KE','KG','KH','KI','KM','KN','KP','KR','KW','KY','KZ','LA','LB','LC','LI','LK','LR','LS','LT','LU','LV','LY','MA','MC','MD','ME','MF','MG','MH','MK','ML','MM','MN','MO','MP','MQ','MR','MS','MT','MU','MV','MW','MX','MY','MZ','NA','NC','NE','NF','NG','NH','NI','NL','NO','NP','NR','NU','NZ','OM','PA','PE','PF','PG','PH','PK','PL','PM','PN','PR','PS','PT','PW','PY','QA','QO','RE','RH','RO','RS','RU','RW','SA','SB','SC','SD','SE','SG','SH','SI','SJ','SK','SL','SM','SN','SO','SR','SS','ST','SU','SV','SX','SY','SZ','TA','TC','TD','TF','TG','TH','TJ','TK','TL','TM','TN','TO','TP','TR','TT','TV','TW','TZ','UA','UG','UK','UM','UN','US','UY','UZ','VA','VC','VD','VE','VG','VI','VN','VU','WF','WS','XA','XB','XK','YD','YE','YT','YU','ZA','ZM','ZR','ZW','ZZ'], ['Ascension Island','Andorra','United Arab Emirates','Afghanistan','Antigua & Barbuda','Anguilla','Albania','Armenia','Curaçao','Angola','Antarctica','Argentina','American Islands','Vietnam','Vanuatu','Wallis & Futuna','Samoa','Pseudo-Accents','Pseudo-Bidi','Kosovo','Yemen','Yemen','Mayotte','Serbia','South Africa','Zambia','Congo - Kinshasa','Zimbabwe','Unknown Region'], code) AS country,
  failure_category,
  reason,
  payment_method,
  count() AS failures
FROM failures
WHERE code != ''
GROUP BY country, failure_category, reason, payment_method
ORDER BY failures DESC
LIMIT 100

panels.title: Risky Users — High Payment Failures
panels.description: Users with the most failed payment attempts in the time range, joined to d1_user (ban status, tier, github) and the latest scoring_snapshot (trust score, account age). Sort by fraudulent_attempts to find carders, by attempted_amount_usd to find big bets, or by failed_attempts for raw volume. Click the github_username to open the profile.

targets.rawSql:
WITH
  failed_payments AS (
    SELECT
      user_id,
      customer_email,
      count() AS failed_attempts,
      countIf(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'last_payment_error', 'decline_code') = 'fraudulent') AS fraudulent_attempts,
      round(sum(amount_cents) / 100.0, 2) AS attempted_amount_usd,
      max(timestamp) AS last_failure_at
    FROM stripe_event
    WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp < $__toTime
      AND event_type = 'payment_intent.payment_failed'
      AND livemode = 1
      AND user_id != ''
    GROUP BY user_id, customer_email
    HAVING failed_attempts >= 2
  ),
  latest_users AS (
    SELECT id, github_username, email, tier, banned
    FROM d1_user
    WHERE synced_at = (SELECT max(synced_at) FROM d1_user)
  ),
  latest_scores AS (
    SELECT
      user_id,
      argMax(trust_score, timestamp)            AS trust_score,
      argMax(total_score, timestamp)            AS total_score,
      argMax(github_age_days, timestamp)        AS github_age_days,
      argMax(pollinations_age_days, timestamp)  AS pollinations_age_days
    FROM scoring_snapshot
    GROUP BY user_id
  )
SELECT
  coalesce(nullIf(u.github_username, ''), '(no github)') AS github_username,
  coalesce(nullIf(u.email, ''), f.customer_email) AS email,
  u.tier AS tier,
  if(u.banned = 1, 'BANNED', 'active') AS banned,
  f.failed_attempts,
  f.fraudulent_attempts,
  f.attempted_amount_usd,
  coalesce(s.trust_score, 100) AS trust_score,
  round(coalesce(s.total_score, 0), 1) AS total_score,
  coalesce(s.github_age_days, 0)       AS github_age_days,
  coalesce(s.pollinations_age_days, 0) AS pollinations_age_days,
  f.last_failure_at
FROM failed_payments f
LEFT JOIN latest_users  u ON f.user_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN latest_scores s ON f.user_id = s.user_id
ORDER BY f.fraudulent_attempts DESC, f.failed_attempts DESC
LIMIT 50

title: User Intelligence
